description: A lab manager needs to schedule preventative maintenance for a high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) machine.

nodes.task_description: Check the maintenance schedule for the specific HPLC machine.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the annual preventative maintenance is due next month.

nodes.task_description: Contact the equipment vendor to schedule a service visit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the vendor and schedules a service engineer for a specific date.

nodes.task_description: Block off the equipment's time in the lab scheduling system for the day of the maintenance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully makes the HPLC unavailable for booking on the scheduled date.

nodes.task_description: Log the completion of the maintenance and upload the service report once the visit is complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the maintenance record and attaches the vendor's service report.
